title: Enspamting Table
description: Turns the enchanting table and related features into Spamton from Deltarune.
body:
HEY EVERY !!! IT'S ME!!! [[вЂ‹3very Buddy]]'S FAVORITE [[#1 Rated Salesman1997]] SPAMTON G. SPAMTON!

HAVE YOU EVER WANTED TO [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Getting stronger]]? MAKE YOUR [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Hyperlink Blocked]] MORE [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Hyperlink вЂ‹Blocked]]? WELL I HAVE JUST THE DEAL FOR [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Well-meaning and respectable]] LIGHT NER'S LIKE YOU! FOR THE LOW-LOW PRICE OF [вЂ‹[вЂ‹All my]] KROMER AND [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Between 0 and 0.0 ]] Pipis, YOU TOO CAN BE A BIG SHOT!
[[Now updated to the 26.2 Chaos Cubed drop for Minecraft: Java Edition]]


[[Feel free to rearrange, delete, or modify the files in this pack however you want, as long as you don't release them publicly alongside my files.]]


<details>
<summary>TAKE A LOOK AT OUR [[Incredible translations!]]! ONLY $19....</summary>

- BIG SHARP = Sharpness
- TAKE A GOD DAMN VACATION STRAIGHT TO HELL = Smite
- GET RID OF THOSE PESKY = Bane of Arthropods
- SHOVE ME AWAY = Knockback
- [вЂ‹Terminate Employment] ASPECT = Fire Aspect
- [вЂ‹Go missing in] OUR $WEEPSTAKES! = Sweeping Edge
- F00LPROOF PROTECTION! = Protection
- GET RID OF BURNS FOR = Fire Protection
- FALL [вЂ‹from] GRACE = Feather Falling
- OBS1DIAN SHIELD? WRONG [вЂ‹Terraria]! = Blast Protection
- BECOM3 BULLETPROOF FOR = Projectile Protection
- A BREATHE OF FR33DOM = Respiration
- [вЂ‹Buy AquaMine now!] = Aqua Affinity
- JOGGING [[вЂ‹with the fishes]] = Depth Strider
- HEY IS IT COLD IN HERE OR IS IT JUST ME? = Frost Walker
- [вЂ‹HeartShapedObject] HASTE = Soul Speed
- [вЂ‹Rates] = Efficiency
- [вЂ‹Fluffy] AXE = Silk Touch
- [вЂ‹Never break a tool again!] = Unbreaking
- PAY WITH THEIR [вЂ‹Rapidly-Shrinking] LIFE'S! = Looting
- [вЂ‹Multiply your mining profits CHEAP!] = Fortune
- LUCKY LITTLE [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Sea]] = Luck of the Sea
- MEET SINGLE [вЂ‹Fish in the sea] NEAR YOU! = Lure
- BIG SHOT = Power
- 3X the [[вЂ‹Fire]]power = Flame
- [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Kick me]] = Punch
- [вЂ‹Multiply your arrows, only $19.95!] = Infinity
- [вЂ‹[вЂ‹ThornRing]] = Thorns
- [вЂ‹Transfer KROMER and get durability FREE!] = Mending
- [[вЂ‹Terms and Agreements]] = Curse of Binding
- DISAPPEAR LIKE THE OTHERS = Curse of Vanishing
- [[вЂ‹Silly Strings]] = Loyalty
- STAB [вЂ‹You in the back] HARDER! = Impaling
- WATCH ME FLY, [вЂ‹[вЂ‹Mama!]] = Riptide
- YOU ARE A FALSE GOD = Channeling
- MULTI SHOTS = Multishot
- [[вЂ‹Insta-Load!]] = Quick Charge
- RIP A HOLE THROUGH YOUR = Piercing
- GOTTA GO [[$neaking]] = Swift Sneak (based on a suggestion in the comments)
- JUST LIKE MY BROTHER = Density
- PURCHASE ANTI-ARMOR!!! = Breach
- [[Also try Hollow Knight!]] = Wind Burst
- PLUNGER = Lunge

</details>

OTHER CHANGES INCLUDIATED:
- Enchanted Book = LoadedDisk
- Lapis Lazuli = Pipis
- Experience = KROMER
- Librarian = [[#1 Rated Salesman1997]]
- AND MORE!!! BUYNOW BUYNOW BUYNOW BUYNOW BUYNOW BUYNOW BUYNOW

Do not take Enspamting Table(TM) Texture Pack if you are pregnant, elderly, or averse to disclosing your credit card information to online spam accounts]]
